title: The Number of Employees Which Report to Each Employee
titleCn: 每位经理的下属员工数量

testcases.input: Employees table: +-------------+---------+------------+-----+ | employee_id | name | reports_to | age | +-------------+---------+------------+-----+ | 9 | Hercy | null | 43 | | 6 | Alice | 9 | 41 | | 4 | Bob | 9 | 36 | | 2 | Winston | null | 37 | +-------------+---------+------------+-----+ Output: +-------------+-------+---------------+-------------+ | employee_id | name | reports_count | average_age | +-------------+-------+---------------+-------------+ | 9 | Hercy | 2 | 39 | +-------------+-------+---------------+-------------+ Explanation: Hercy has 2 people report directly to him, Alice and Bob. Their average age is (41+36)/2 = 38.5, which is 39 after rounding it to the nearest integer.
testcases.expectedOutput: +-------------+-------+---------------+-------------+ | employee_id | name | reports_count | average_age | +-------------+-------+---------------+-------------+ | 9 | Hercy | 2 | 39 | +-------------+-------+---------------+-------------+ Explanation: Hercy has 2 people report directly to him, Alice and Bob. Their average age is (41+36)/2 = 38.5, which is 39 after rounding it to the nearest integer.
